content:
<USER_REQUEST>
Add comprehensive diagnostic logging to the following file:

D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\deepcheck\session\DeepCheckSession.kt

Log these events:
1. run() start — SMS sender, text length, whether engine is null
2. Fast-path check — result (allowlisted/known scam/IP/etc), timing
3. Engine load — timing
4. createSession — timing
5. Each LLM turn — turn number, response length, first 100 chars of response
6. Verdict parsing — which parser matched (educational/legacy JSON/raw/none)
7. Tool calls — tool name, argument, result type, timing
8. Final verdict — label, confidence, explanation length
9. Rule-based fallback — why it was triggered, evidence count
10. Errors and timeouts — specific error messages
11. cancel() — when called

Use Diagnostics.SESSION, Diagnostics.TOOL, and Diagnostics.PARSE as categories.
Use Diagnostics.timedSuspend for heavy operations.
Do NOT change any logic — only add Diagnostics calls.
Add the import: import com.smssentry.deepcheck.util.Diagnostics
</USER_REQUEST>
<ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
The current local time is: 2026-06-14T12:58:31+05:30.
</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>

thinking: Let me start by reading the file to understand its structure and then add diagnostic logging.
